name: devp0tion
description: DevP0tion's integrated Claude Code plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: xlmcp
plugins.description: Excel automation MCP server (49 tools). Session pooling, virtual clipboard, chunked parallel I/O. Windows only.

plugins.name: team-report
plugins.description: Multi-agent team analysis producing an interactive paginated HTML report with Accept/Defer/Reject decision cards and a feedback loop.

plugins.name: nunchi
plugins.description: Work-intensity calibration ('just enough') passive skill. Records prediction-vs-reality surprises per project and re-injects them at session start for recursive improvement. Requires Bun.
